name: BioRestorative Therapies, Inc.
summary: BioRestorative Therapies, Inc. (BRTX) develops therapeutic products using cell and tissue protocols, primarily involving adult stem cells. Its lead product, BRTX-100, is an autologous mesenchymal stem cell therapy in Phase 2 clinical trials for chronic lower back pain from degenerative disc disease. It also runs the ThermoStem Program for metabolic disorders using brown adipose stem cells, and operates a commercial biocosmeceutical platform producing a cell-based secretome serum.

products.name: BRTX-100
products.description: Autologous cultured mesenchymal stem cell therapy for non-surgical treatment of painful lumbosacral disc disorders and chronic lower back pain from degenerative disc disease.

products.name: ThermoStem Program
products.description: Pre-clinical cell-based therapy using brown adipose derived stem cells to target obesity, type 2 diabetes, hypertension, and metabolic disorders.

products.name: BioCosmeceutical Serum
products.description: Commercial cell-based secretome product containing exosomes, proteins, and growth factors engineered to reduce fine lines and wrinkles.

products.name: Curved Needle Device
products.description: Licensed investigational curved needle device designed to deliver cells or therapeutic products to the spine, discs, and other body parts.
